subcodes.first_line: O Lord! O Thou Who enkindleth the hearts wherein blazeth the fire of Thy love, O Thou Who draweth unto Thee those hearts that have melted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا وله قلوب التی اضطرمت فیها نار محبتک و یا جذبه افئده التی ذابت و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @love of God
